name: 03_post_trigger_high_count_preserved
description: Guard composition: armed=True AND triggered=True simultaneously with a stale non-zero count (5). Triggered wins; count preserved exactly (not reset to 0, not incremented).
derivation: armed=True AND is_triggered=True -> guard `armed AND not triggered` evaluates True AND False = False. Block skipped. below_stop_count preserved at exactly 5; hit is False. This fixture catches an impl that would either (a) reset the count under the triggered branch or (b) increment because the inner condition is technically not evaluated.
